title.en: Blessings Before and After Torah Study
title.zh: 《妥拉祝福词》：神圣学习的祝福

subtitle.en: Birchot HaTorah — the special blessings said each morning before learning, and why Torah study itself is considered a mitzvah
subtitle.he: ברכות התורה - הברכות המיוחדות שאומרים כל בוקר לפני הלימוד, ולמה לימוד תורה נחשב בעצמו למצווה
subtitle.zh: 妥拉祝福词——每天早晨学习前念诵的特殊祝福，以及为什么妥拉学习本身被视为诫命

sources.reference: How sweet are Your words to my palate

header_image.description: Ancient Hebrew scroll unfurled on a wooden reading stand, with golden morning light streaming through a window. Hebrew letters visible on the parchment, with traditional Jewish prayer items (tallit, tefillin) arranged nearby. The atmosphere conveys sacred morning study preparation, with warm lighting emphasizing the reverence of Torah learning.
header_image.alt_text: Torah scroll with Hebrew text illuminated by morning light, symbolizing the sacred blessings of Torah study
header_image.style: warm, reverent, traditional Jewish study setting

chinese_cultural_references: Ming Dynasty daily study as spiritual cultivation
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
